features.name: alwaysff with syncreset negedge reset
features.description: Code should include an sv.alwaysff block with (syncreset : negedge RESETN) trigger, where the negedge reset condition gets incorrectly inverted during Verilog generation
features.snippet: sv.alwaysff(posedge CLK) { sv.passign %1, %I : i8 } (syncreset : negedge RESETN) { sv.passign %1, %2 : i8 }
